name: The Howl (Threat)
description: All enemies gain +1 to all stats. This effect can stack.
notes: This card has no effects of its own -- it works by being CHECKED for via a has_tarot (or tarot_stacks_min, for per-stack scaling) condition inside scaling configs, exactly like content/scaling/forest_scaling_stage_3.json's conditional_modifiers already demonstrate. See FIELD_REFERENCE.md's note on stacking + scaling for the current limitation around exact multi-stack math.
